DAC_Cookie_Banner_Usability_01 (AAA)


Description

Journey / Step
Journey 1 – Step 1 (Service entry)

URL
https://fes-ext.pre.private.defra.gov.uk/?loggedIn=yes

Description
When users enter the service, no cookie banner is displayed to allow them to make a cookie preference selection. Users may reasonably expect a cookie banner to appear at the top of the page, above the “Skip to main content” link, in line with Welcome to GOV.UK  standards.

This issue may also be present on other pages throughout the service. Wherever this occurs, the same remediation will be required.

Problem Statement
Users are unable to manage or consent to cookies on entry to the service due to the absence of a cookie banner, which may lead to confusion and does not align with Welcome to GOV.UK  Design System guidance.

Acceptance Criteria
A cookie banner is displayed on service entry.

The banner appears above the “Skip to main content” link.

Users can choose to accept or reject cookies.
